tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: Hey, I want to check what we already have stored about our design collaboration preferences and working patterns. Can you show me what's currently remembered about how we work with designers on projects?

function_call.name: skill-tools-search_memories
function_call.arguments: {"limit": 10, "query": "design collaboration preferences working patterns designers projects"}

messages.content:
The search didn't find any stored memories about design collaboration preferences or working patterns. It looks like we haven't stored anything about that topic yet.

Would you like to start adding some notes about your design collaboration preferences and working patterns so we can reference them in future conversations?

Yes, that would be great. Let me start documenting what we've learned about working with our graphic designer. She prefers to receive feedback in writing before our sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance. Also, she tends to work in longer focused blocks in the mornings, so scheduling creative reviews in the afternoon works better for her.

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "Design collaboration preferences: Graphic designer prefers receiving feedback in writing before sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance. She works in longer focused blocks in the morning, so scheduling creative reviews in the afternoon works better for her."}

messages.content: {"memory": {"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "Design collaboration preferences: Graphic designer prefers receiving feedback in writing before sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance. She works in longer focused blocks in the morning, so scheduling creative reviews in the afternoon works better for her."}}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content:
Got it! I've stored those details about your graphic designer:

- **Feedback format**: Prefers receiving feedback in writing before sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance
- **Scheduling**: Works in longer focused blocks in the mornings, so creative reviews are better scheduled for the afternoon

Let me know if you'd like to add any more details about your design collaboration patterns!
Now that we've added those details, can you show me all the memories we've stored so far? I want to review everything we've documented about the design collaboration.

{"memories": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "Design collaboration preferences: Graphic designer prefers receiving feedback in writing before sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance. She works in longer focused blocks in the morning, so scheduling creative reviews in the afternoon works better for her."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Here's everything currently stored:

1. **Design collaboration preferences** (ID: m2)
   - Graphic designer prefers receiving feedback in writing before sync calls so she can prepare mockups in advance
   - She works in longer focused blocks in the morning, so scheduling creative reviews in the afternoon works better for her

That's the only memory in storage so far. Would you like to add any other details about your design collaboration or working patterns?

I see we only have that one memory stored, and honestly it still seems accurate and relevant to our current workflow. But I want to make sure we're keeping things clean and up to date. Can you go ahead and delete that memory anyway? I'd rather rebuild fresh if anything has changed rather than rely on potentially stale information.

Done! That memory has been deleted. The slate is clean and ready for you to rebuild fresh whenever you're ready to add current details about your design collaboration workflow. Let me know when you'd like to start adding those notes again!
